title: Understanding the Relationship
text: To find the angle of rotation, we need to understand the relationship between the arc length, radius, and angle in radians. The formula is: arc length $$=$$ radius * angle.

title: Using the Formula
text: We know the arc length is $$3.0$$ $$m$$ and the radius is $$1.5$$ $$m$$. Substitute these values into the formula: $$3.0$$ $$=$$ $$1.5$$ * angle.

title: Solving for the Angle
text: Rearrange the equation to solve for the angle: angle $$=$$ arc length / radius.

title: Final Calculation
text: Calculate the angle using the rearranged formula: angle $$=$$ $$3.0$$ / $$1.5$$.
